name: Music, TV Central to Dell Consumer Push
description: CBS MarketWatch coverage of Dell's September 2003 consumer-electronics expansion — launching a 17-inch LCD TV and Dell Jukebox digital music player — explicitly framed as a challenge to Apple and Gateway in the music/TV consumer space. Peter Kastner of Aberdeen Group predicts Dell's low-cost direct business model will pay off: 'Dell.com becoming even more of an online electronics superstore.' Competitor Gateway's Mike Moeller disputes that selling music and TVs is enough.
